description_long: This helicopter features a streamlined, elongated fuselage with a camouflage-patterned exterior, suggesting a military or tactical application. The main rotor consists of two long, slender black blades, while the tail section is equipped with a smaller tail rotor for stability and control. The landing gear comprises two simple, rounded skids positioned beneath the fuselage, providing ground support. The cockpit area is smoothly integrated into the body, but no distinct cockpit windows or doors are visible, giving the helicopter a seamless appearance. The surface finish appears matte with a slightly rough texture, and the overall build suggests a lightweight yet durable construction. No visible registration numbers or markings are present on the exterior.
description: A streamlined, camouflage-patterned helicopter with long black rotor blades, simple landing skids, and a seamless body lacking visible cockpit windows or markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated fuselage, main and tail rotors, and both landing skids clearly.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the full span of the main rotor blades and the narrow body profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the tail rotor and landing skids from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail section, tail rotor, and the alignment of the landing skids.
attribute_rotor_blades: Two long, slender main rotor blades, black in color, with a straight shape and no visible markings.
attribute_tail_rotor: A small tail rotor with two blades, oriented vertically, black in color, and no visible protective structure.
attribute_landing_skids: Two simple, rounded landing skids, likely made of metal or composite, gray in color, with minimal visible structural features.
